title: Two Oceans: Making a splash
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Two runners from...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Two runners from Plettenberg Bay completed the Two Oceans Ultra Marathon (56km) on Saturday 5 April in under four hours, achieving silver medals.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Two runners from Plettenberg Bay completed the Two Oceans Ultra Marathon (56km) on Saturday 5 April in under four hours, achieving silver medals."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Unathi Ndawo (32) from the Nedbank Running Club SWD (Plett section) finished in 03:49:50, at an average pace of 4:07 minutes per km."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sivuyile Qole (38) from the Plett Athletics Club came in not far behind Unathi, in 03:50:05, also an average pace of 4:07 minutes per km.","html":"Sivuyile Qole (38) from the Plett Athletics Club came in not far behind Unathi, in 03:50:05, also an average pace of 4:07 minutes per km."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Although hot weather was forecast for the day, it turned out to be perfect, with temperatures remaining in the low 20s for most of the run around the beautiful route, which takes in Chapman's Peak Drive, and finishes at the UCT campus.","html":"Although hot weather was forecast for the day, it turned out to be perfect, with temperatures remaining in the low 20s for most of the run around the beautiful route, which takes in Chapman's Peak Drive, and finishes at the UCT campus."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
